description: For the woman with an modern, dynamic lifestyle, the floral oriental Free Emotion from adidas is the right choice. Bottled in a yellow flacon it has top notes of lemon, Canadian apples, black currant and raspberry, mid notes of freesia, delicate rose petals and subtle aromas of fresh lily, hibiscus, banana and African green melon with base notes of cedar, cotton and musk.Quantity: 50 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
